data.title: SignalPlus Integrates Bybit’s USDT Options Ecosystem
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News SignalPlus announced the completion of the integration with the Bybit USDT options ecosystem, supporting users to trade USDT options within the platform. This integration enables traders to use USDT directly as margin, obtain better liquidity and higher capital efficiency.
Bybit has also upgraded its portfolio margin (PM) calculation method, further reducing the margin ratio required for trading.
SignalPlus is committed to providing users with advanced and efficient trading solutions, and through its cutting-edge QuantLab and trading terminals, it demonstrates deep professional capabilities in quantitative trading and risk management.

data.title: Bithumb and Upbit announce the delisting of HIFI
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: South Korean crypto exchanges Bithumb and Upbit announced that they will delist the HIFI token. The specific delisting time and related details have not yet been announced. Please pay attention to asset management and transaction risks.

data.title: Ministry of Finance: Adjust the prescribed additional tariff rate from 84% to 125%.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On April 10, 2025, the US government announced that the rate of "reciprocal tariffs" on Chinese goods exported to the United States would be further increased to 125%. The US's imposition of abnormally high tariffs on China seriously violates international trade rules, basic economic laws and common sense, and is completely a unilateral bullying and coercion. In accordance with the "Tariff Law of the People's Republic of China", "Customs Law of the People's Republic of China", "Foreign Trade Law of the People's Republic of China" and other laws and regulations and basic principles of international law, with the approval of the State Council, from April 12, 2025, the tariff measures on imported goods originating from the United States will be adjusted. The relevant matters are as follows: 
1. Adjust the tariff rate stipulated in the "Announcement of the State Council Tariff Commission on Adjusting the Tariff Measures on Imports Originating from the United States" (Tax Commission Announcement No. 5 of 2025) from 84% to 125%. Given that at the current tariff level, there is no market acceptance for US goods exported to China, if the US continues to impose tariffs on Chinese goods exported to the United States, China will ignore it. 
2. Other matters shall be implemented in accordance with the "Announcement of the Tariff Commission of the State Council on the imposition of additional tariffs on imported goods originating from the United States" (Tax Commission Announcement No. 4 of 2025). (Jinshi)

data.title: Bitget Wallet launches Four.Meme internal trading function, supports BNB chain launch platform currency
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Web3 wallet Bitget Wallet has integrated the internal trading function of BNB Chain launch platform Four.Meme, which supports users to search for the contract address of newly issued internal currency on the market page and trade directly without jumping to other platforms. The launch of this function will enhance the convenience of users participating in early projects in the Four.Meme ecosystem. Users can interact with the smart contract on the chain directly through the wallet to complete transactions without relying on third-party platforms for matching.
Four.Meme is one of the active Meme coin launch platforms on BNB Chain recently, and many new projects have been launched on the platform. Bitget Wallet said that it will launch a list of Four.Meme internal currency in the future to track the dynamics of active assets in the ecosystem.

data.title: China to Increase Tariffs on U.S. Imports Starting April 2025
data.description: According to Foresight News, China's State Council Tariff Commission has announced an adjustment to the tariffs imposed on imports originating from the United States. Effective April 12, 2025, the tariff rate will be increased from 84% to 125%. This decision marks a significant change in the trade policy between the two nations, potentially impacting various sectors reliant on U.S. imports. The adjustment reflects ongoing trade tensions and economic strategies as China seeks to navigate its international trade relationships.

data.title: sUSD depegging is caused by the change of SIP-420 mechanism, not bad debt problem
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Parsec analysis, the recent depegging of Synthetix stablecoin sUSD is not due to bad debt or protocol failure, but a side effect of the adjustment of the SIP-420 mechanism. SIP-420 introduces a shared debt pool mechanism. SNX pledgers no longer mint sUSD alone and assume personal debts, but entrust funds to the public pool, thereby achieving a structure without liquidation and personal debt. However, when the sUSD price deviates from the anchor value, the pledger no longer has the motivation to repurchase sUSD at a low price to repay the debt, and the original self-regulation mechanism of the protocol becomes invalid. At the same time, more than $80 million of SNX flowed into the SIP-420 pool, and the Infinex activity drove the growth of holdings, which led to a rapid expansion of sUSD supply, while the market lacked corresponding demand, and the anchor mechanism was further under pressure. At present, sUSD has fallen to $0.87, with a depegging rate of more than 13%. The Synthetix team said it is rebuilding sUSD demand by integrating with Aave, Ethena, and strengthening Curve incentives.

data.title: DARK briefly broke through 0.009USDT, and the 24-hour increase exceeded 180%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the market, the price of DARK briefly broke through 0.009USDT and is now at 0.008222USDT, with a 24-hour increase of more than 180%. DARK is an experimental network based on a trusted execution environment (TEE) designed to provide support for an infinitely scalable MCP world.

data.title: Since January 2021, the supply of stablecoins on the Ethereum mainnet has increased more than 5 times to $123 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official DefiLlama on the X platform, in January 2021, the supply of stablecoins on the ETH mainnet was only $22 billion; in comparison, this figure has now grown to $123 billion. In addition, the chart information shows that the price of ETH has fallen by nearly two-thirds compared to its 2021 high.

data.title: Ethereum Stablecoin Supply Surges to $123 Billion
data.description: According to Odaily, the stablecoin supply on the Ethereum mainnet has seen significant growth since January 2021. At that time, the supply was $22 billion, but it has now increased to $123 billion. Despite this growth in stablecoin supply, Ethereum's price has dropped by nearly two-thirds from its peak in 2021.

data.title: Abstract Chain Reaches Over 1.16 Million Addresses
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from Dune indicates that the Layer 2 network Abstract Chain, designed for on-chain culture and community, has reached 1,161,393 addresses. The network's DeFi protocol total value locked (TVL) stands at $14.97 million.
